title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ixigo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ixigo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the ixigo family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ixigo:
ixigo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo!
